name: TalkingParents
keyWeaknesses: Free tier ending June 2026 - all users forced to paid plans
Per-parent billing up to $960/year for two parents
No Australian school terms or holidays
Data hosted in the United States
headline: CoRaise vs TalkingParents: Why Australian Families Are Switching
description: TalkingParents is ending its free tier in June 2026. Compare CoRaise - the Australian alternative with free and affordable plans, local data hosting, and court-ready exports.
whySwitchPoints: CoRaise has a permanent free tier - no bait-and-switch
Save up to $780/year compared to TalkingParents paid plans
Data hosted in Sydney, not the United States
Australian school terms and public holidays built in
Evidence Act 1995 (Cth) compliant exports, not just 'unalterable records'
DV safety features including emergency exit and harassment detection

faq.question: Is TalkingParents really ending its free plan?
faq.answer: Yes. TalkingParents has announced that its free tier will end in June 2026. All users will be required to move to a paid plan. CoRaise offers a permanent free tier with core features like messaging, calendar, and basic expense tracking.

faq.question: How does CoRaise's free plan compare to what TalkingParents offered for free?
faq.answer: CoRaise's free plan includes 50 messages per month, a shared calendar, view-only child information, basic expense logging, and the emergency exit button. TalkingParents' free tier offered messaging and calendar but is being discontinued entirely.

faq.question: Are TalkingParents records admissible in Australian courts?
faq.answer: TalkingParents markets 'unalterable records' but does not specifically comply with the Evidence Act 1995 (Cth). CoRaise generates SHA-256 hashed, court-formatted PDF exports designed specifically for Australian family law proceedings.

faq.question: Can both parents use CoRaise on one subscription?
faq.answer: Yes. CoRaise uses a single family subscription that covers both parents. On the Family plan ($9.99/month), you can split the cost 50/50 so each parent pays just $4.99/month. TalkingParents charges each parent separately.

faq.question: Does CoRaise have unalterable records like TalkingParents?
faq.answer: Yes, and more. Every CoRaise message is tamper-proof - it cannot be edited or deleted after sending. Each message also receives a SHA-256 content hash generated by a database trigger, providing cryptographic proof of integrity that goes beyond TalkingParents' approach.
